detaileddescription.para: Decodes a code point from UTF-8.
Converts the first character in a UTF-8 sequence into a Unicode code point.

parameterdescription.para: address of a location to store the code point [OUT]

simplesect.para: the number of bytes occupied by the decoded code point

parameterdescription.para: null character (i.e. str points to an empty string)

detaileddescription.para: Checks whether a null-terminated string is a valid UTF-8 bytes sequence.

parameterdescription.para: the string is a valid null-terminated UTF-8 sequence
the string is not an UTF-8 sequence

detaileddescription.para: Replaces invalid or over-long UTF-8 bytes sequences within a null-terminated string with question marks. This is so that the string can be printed at least partially.

simplesect.para: Do not use this were correctness is critical. use IsUTF8() and handle the error case instead. This function is mainly for display or debug.
Converting from Latin-1 to UTF-8 in place is not possible (the string size would be increased). So it is not attempted even if it would otherwise be less disruptive.

parameterdescription.para: the string is a valid null-terminated UTF-8 sequence (i.e. no changes were made)
the string is not an UTF-8 sequence

memberdef.argsstring: (vlc_iconv_t, const char **, size_t *, char **, size_t *) VLC_USED
memberdef.name: vlc_iconv

memberdef.argsstring: (const char *charset, const void *data, size_t data_size) VLC_USED
memberdef.name: FromCharset

detaileddescription.para: Converts a nul-terminated string from ISO-8859-1 to UTF-8.
